reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y rapidez, lo único es que la nafta si es mas cara que en capital

Excellent service and speed, the only downside is that gas is more expensive than in the capital.

reviews.comment:
Feriado de carnaval andaban la mitad de los surtidores, colas de 2 cuadras

(Translated by Google)
During the carnival holiday, only half the gas pumps were working, with lines two blocks long.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de una Sra y su compañero de turno...
Baños limpios.
Gracias por avisarnos que habían corsos y donde eran ( aunque no fuimos) fue muy atenta y amable!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from a lady and her colleague on duty...
Clean restrooms.
Thank you for letting us know about the carnival parades and where they were (even though we didn't go). She was very attentive and kind!

reviews.comment:
Carga al toke la nafta
Te dicen hola y ya te están cargando

They fill up the tank in a flash.
They say hello and they're already filling you up.

reviews.comment:
Tenia 2 autos adelante, me tuvieron 40 minutos, dos empleados ambos muy antipaticos y sin ganas de trabajar, uno era re bizcocho y me contesto mal, servicio pesimo

(Translated by Google)
There were two cars ahead of me, they kept me waiting for 40 minutes, two employees, both very unfriendly and unwilling to work, one was really rude and answered me rudely, terrible service
